properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 80/13
ANDOEYA NORWAY
ANDOEYA ROCKETRANGE WILL LAUNCHE TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS IN THE TIME PERIOD 9.-21. SEPTEMBER 2013.
THE LAUNCHINGS TO BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0800 - 1600 UTC WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.

HAZARD AREA 1 INNER AREA
A SECTOR WITH ORIGON IN THE LAUNCHER COORDINATES 69-17.66N 16-01.18E.
TRUE BEARING 305 - 350
SECTOR LENGTH 14 NM

HAZARD AREA 2 OUTER AREA
AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES
A. 73-04.00 N 14-52.00 E
B. 70-52.00 N 17-54.00 E
C. 69-50.00 N 14-47.00 E
D. 69-25.00 N 10-09.00 E
E. 71-56.00 N 06-17.00 E
F. 73-04.00 N 14-52.00 E

SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AVARE OF THE HAZARD AREA.
